scripts.dev:app: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd apps/server dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm --entrypoint bun dev run --cwd apps/server scripts/seed.ts
scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm --entrypoint bun dev test apps/server/test/db.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from e2e; docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml down
